responseMessageContents.text:
The user says "Verified reels now". They're confirming the reels are verified. The system context about new project is noise — I should ignore it since we're in an active project.

Let me just acknowledge briefly.

Confirmed — reels are live and matching the landing page. What would you like to tackle next? The remaining open items from our roadmap are:

1. **PITR confirmation** — check Supabase Dashboard → Database → Backups to verify WAL archiving is active (backend can't verify programmatically)
2. **Off-site AWS S3 backup bucket** — needs your separate AWS credentials for cross-account storage
3. **Immutable/object-lock storage** — enable on the backup bucket once created
4. **Data Recovery Center screen test** — navigate to `/admin/data-recovery` on device
5. **APK build** — via EAS Build or a real machine (sandbox OOMs Gradle)

responseMessageContents.title: Updated the app videos to match the main page, improved the login security, and set up better data protection.
responseMessageContents.description: This update makes the video reels section look exactly like the main landing page. We also made the login process more secure by requiring the owner to sign in manually each time. Additionally, we added new features to protect and back up your data and fixed problems that were causing the app to close unexpectedly.
